summary: Phase 1b validation: 13/14 backend tests PASS (1 skip is RNG-luck on share-card high-mult); frontend FriendsPage, DevCreditFab, x10 batch open + animation + WinModal all verified working. All Phase 1b endpoints behave per spec (open-batch atomic 10x, referral E2E tag→play→credit→claim, share-card auth+mult gating, internal API X-Internal-Secret gating).

minor.issue: Fallback `claimed = float(user.get('referral_balance', 0.0))` reads from the cached pre-update doc passed via Depends; if request races with another claim/credit it could be stale, but test confirmed correct claim amount in single-user scenario.
`new_balance` is returned as `float(upd['balance_ton']) - 0` — the `- 0` is dead code (lines 1487). Cosmetic only.

ui_bugs.issue: Initial test using force-click on [data-testid='nav-friends'] (NavLink with children-as-function) did not change route; direct URL navigation to /friends?dev=1 works fine and all friends-page testids render. May be Playwright + NavLink render-prop quirk; user-facing tap in TG webview should still work. Verify with real user interaction.

issues: Top header (avatar @user, balance pill, Connect Wallet) overflows the 390px viewport — Connect Wallet text gets clipped at right edge in TG mobile width. Consider shortening or hiding label below 400px.

action_items: Header overflow on 390px viewport — Connect Wallet label clipped (visual polish).
Optional: investigate if NavLink to /friends needs explicit query-param preservation (?dev=1) so dev mode survives nav.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1900 lines — recommend splitting Phase 1b modules (referrals, share_card, internal API) into dedicated route files before Phase 2.
/api/referrals/claim derives claimed_ton from the pre-request user doc (Depends cache); under heavy concurrent open+claim, value could be stale. Consider deriving from total_earnings - total_claimed.
Batch open writes 10 individual inserts to rolls_col + 10 to inventory_col in a Python loop — for higher throughput, use insert_many (single round-trip).
Share-card has no rate-limiting; a user could spam /generate (cached path is cheap but still validated).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all Phase 1b features render & work; minor nav-click quirk)

seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral users with tg_id in 800000+ range per run (REFERRER, REFEREE, OTHER + offsets). No cleanup performed; data is dev-scoped.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1b backend is solid. The Phase 1b test file (/app/backend/tests/test_lydomania_phase1b.py) parameterizes tg_id by current time so reruns don't collide. Share-card high-mult test is RNG-dependent; bump credit + open-count if you want reliable >=2x success. Frontend nav-friends via click() under Playwright is flaky on first attempt — prefer page.goto('/friends?dev=1') directly. DevCreditFab gated on ?dev=1 query string.
rca of the issue: No blocker bugs reproduced. The only frontend observation (nav-friends click not triggering route change) only manifested under Playwright force-click; the underlying React Router + NavLink children-as-function pattern is correctly wired and direct URL navigation renders FriendsPage with all expected testids and live data from /api/referrals/me.
